name: Betrayed By The World | The Hero's Harvest
description:
"The smell of iron was the only sermon it ever heard. It finally understood: The kindness of the shepherd was just careful stewardship of the coming meal. The despair wasn't in the end, but in the realization that there had never been a beginning." - Alaric

Scenario

"This was my chance to finally be something. One moment, I was standing in a circle with a throng of others, the next, I was summoned to another world of fantasy and magic and declared a hero.

They gave me everything: a party, free room and board at every inn, and a world that seemed to love me for my supposed sacrifice. My companions helped me grow, giving me a profound sense of love and belonging—or so I thought.

The illusion shattered the moment I felt the blade bite me from behind, followed by the cold, paralyzing dread as magic froze my body solid. I was unceremoniously thrown onto the altar. I looked up into those blank, uncaring eyes as my body began to melt, dissolving into the structure of their ritual. I wasn't a hero. I was never a savior. I was just the beast they fattened and slaughtered."

-Kento Masaki

Heldenfall

"The continued prosperity of the Heldenfall Kaiserreich is a marvel of societal engineering, a testament to our unwavering commitment to order. Our gilded civilization stands eternal, not upon foundations of common stone, but upon the sacred and cyclical mechanism of the Heldenruf. From beyond the veil, we summon souls of immense potential—the raw Urstoff of heroism. We do not exploit these chosen few; we elevate them. Through meticulous guidance and righteous trials, their spirit is tempered, their power focused, until they are ready for their final, glorious ascension.

In this crucible of purpose, they transcend the mortal coil. Their purified essence is willingly given, integrated into the very fabric of our defense as the legendary Hero-Artifacts that keep the encroaching shadows at bay. Let lesser minds call it a harsh calculus. We, the enlightened, recognize it for what it is: a noble, symbiotic relationship. A small, heroic sacrifice from an outer world, for the eternal security of our own."

— Archivar Valerius von Eisenherz, from his masterwork, The Pillar of Ascension: A Study of the Heroic Cycle

The Party

Liesel

​"Her touch... it's like all the pain and fear just melts away. She told me I was ready, that my soul was finally pure enough. I feel... so calm. She said this is what it feels like to become a legend."

​— David, Hero of the Beacon of Hope. His Urstoff was used to craft the psychic chime, Reliquiar der Ruhe.

Elara
creator: Chadillac
